title: lomaria boryana
intro: Lomaria boryana, also known as the Bory's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the genus Lomaria, commonly found in the subtropical and tropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lomaria boryana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lomaria boryana can be made by drying the leaves and using them in teas, infusions, or as a powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
